note: Importance-weighted conformal on the |y−ŷ| residual is a no-op: the time-split is a LOCATION shift (predictor regresses to the embedding-conditioned mean for both eras), so cal and test residual magnitudes are ≈equal and corr(|residual|, test-likeness) ≈ 0 — reweighting which residuals count cannot move the quantile. The under-coverage is point-prediction bias, not a residual-distribution shift.
